items.name: Toasted Special
items.description: A classic Irish toasted sandwich with ham, cheese, and tomato, served with chips.

items.name: Wings
items.description: Crispy chicken wings served with your choice of sauce - buffalo, BBQ, or honey mustard.

items.name: Fish & Chips
items.description: Fresh cod in golden batter, served with hand-cut chips, mushy peas, and tartar sauce.

items.name: Beef Burger
items.description: Premium Irish beef patty with lettuce, tomato, onion, and special sauce, served with chips.

items.name: Crisps
items.description: Selection of Irish crisps - Tayto, King, or imported favourites.

items.name: Nuts
items.description: Roasted peanuts and mixed nuts, perfect with a pint.
